title: Cobblemon: Legends Lugia
description: Legends Lugia is a modpack compilation for Cobblemon, setup for the Vervara Network
body:
## What is Cobblemon: Legends Lugia:

**Cobblemon: Legends Lugia** is a modpack developed for the Minecraft server of the same name. It is designed to offer some Minecraft optimization, remain relatively light weight, and add fun! 

The intention of the modpack is to create an experience similar to the **Legends Arceus** game, within a new setting in Minecraft. Ready to experience the Johto Region like never before? We call it Kansai!

## Legends Arceus Inspired Features:
- **Pokémon behaviors.** Pokémon can spawn into the world as either *skittish*, *neutral*, or even territorial and *aggressive*.
- Mass **Outbreaks.** These events feature large groups of wild Pokémon and can include almost every Pokémon that can be found in the Kansai Region.
- Special **regional forms!** The Kansai Region has been rumored to be the home of several elusive new Pokémon species.

    - *The Legends Lugia team recommends to run the modpack with a minimum of 3.0 GB of memory.*

## Legends Lugia Features So Far:
- Battles using the Pokémon Showdown! engine for competitive battle mechanics.
- Plenty of new and revamped structures dot the landscape making the world ripe for exploration, can you find them all as you go on your pokémon journey?
- Some Legends Arceus-style mechanics, such as move relearning, physically running from battle, and evolving your Pokémon when you decide.
- Toggle free-movement during battles. You can build, mine, or fight mobs while in Pokémon battles!
- Apricorn trees in 7 colors. Harvest Apricorns by right-clicking them, and each harvest has a chance to also drop a seed that can grow a new tree.
- Evolution stones can be found anywhere underground, with different stones located in different biomes. They're more common near the surface.
- Loaded with all the create essentials to bring a new sense of tech and wonder to an otherwise standard cobblemon experience (Including trains)
- And many more Q.O.L. mods to improve your overall experience and performance, Farmers Delight and Sodium to name a few.
- Alas you may rest easy as there are no more pesky tutorial pop-ups.

*Credits to all respective mod developers and their products.*
